ResizeMask.name: ResizeMask

ImageStitch.name: ImageStitch
ImageStitch.description:
将 image2 按指定方向拼接到 image1 上。
如果未提供 image2，则返回未更改的 image1。
可以在图像之间添加可选间距。

ReverseImageBatch.name: ReverseImageBatch
ReverseImageBatch.description: Reverses the order of the images in a batch.

LayerUtility: ImageOpacity.name: LayerUtility: ImageOpacity
LayerUtility: ImageOpacity.display_name: 图层工具：图像不透明度

image.tooltip: Input image to be processed for background removal.

model.tooltip: Select the background removal model to use (RMBG-2.0, INSPYRENET, BEN).

sensitivity.tooltip: Adjust the strength of mask detection (higher values result in more aggressive detection).

process_res.tooltip: Set the processing resolution (higher values require more VRAM and may increase processing time).

mask_blur.tooltip: Specify the amount of blur to apply to the mask edges (0 for no blur, higher values for more blur).

mask_offset.tooltip: Adjust the mask boundary (positive values expand the mask, negative values shrink it).

invert_output.tooltip: Enable to invert both the image and mask output (useful for certain effects).

refine_foreground.tooltip: Use Fast Foreground Colour Estimation to optimize transparent background

background.tooltip: Choose output type: Alpha (transparent) or Color (custom background color).

background_color.tooltip: Pick background color (supports alpha, use color picker).

GetImageSizeAndCount.name: GetImageSizeAndCount
GetImageSizeAndCount.description:
Returns width, height and batch size of the image,  
and passes it through unchanged.

model.tooltip: SeC model loaded from SeCModelLoader node

frames.tooltip: Sequential video frames as IMAGE tensor batch

bbox.tooltip: Bounding box as (x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max) or (x, y, width, height) tuple. Compatible with KJNodes Points Editor bbox output.

annotation_frame_idx.tooltip: Frame where initial prompt is applied

max_frames_to_track.tooltip: Advanced: Max frames to process (-1 for all)

mllm_memory_size.tooltip: Number of keyframes for semantic understanding (no VRAM impact). Original paper used 7, we default to 12 for balance.

offload_video_to_cpu.tooltip: Offload video frames to CPU (saves significant GPU memory, ~3% slower)

auto_unload_model.tooltip: Automatically unload model from memory after segmentation to free GPU and RAM. Model will auto-reload if needed for subsequent runs.

SeCVideoSegmentation.name: SeCVideoSegmentation
SeCVideoSegmentation.description: Concept-driven video object segmentation using Large Vision-Language Models for visual concept extraction. Provide visual prompts (points/bbox/mask) and SeC automatically understands the object concept for robust tracking.

model_file.tooltip: Select SeC model file. Each file has a native precision that will be used automatically.

device.tooltip: Device: auto (gpu0 if available, else CPU), cpu, gpu0/gpu1/etc (specific GPU)

use_flash_attn.tooltip: Enable Flash Attention 2 for faster inference. Automatically disabled for float32 precision.

allow_mask_overlap.tooltip: Allow tracked objects to overlap. Disable for strictly separate objects.

images.tooltip: The images to create a video from.

audio.tooltip: The audio to add to the video.

per_batch.tooltip: Process images in sub-batches to reduce memory usage. 0 disables sub-batching.

ImageResizeKJv2.name: ImageResizeKJv2
ImageResizeKJv2.description:
Resizes the image to the specified width and height.  
Size can be retrieved from the input.

Keep proportions keeps the aspect ratio of the image, by  
highest dimension.

video.tooltip: The video to extract components from.

GetVideoComponents.name: GetVideoComponents
GetVideoComponents.description: 提取视频中的所有元素：帧、音频和帧率。

LazySwitchKJ.name: LazySwitchKJ
LazySwitchKJ.description: Controls flow of execution based on a boolean switch.

VHS_VideoCombine.name: VHS_VideoCombine
VHS_VideoCombine.description: Combine an image sequence into a video

color.tooltip: Color as RGB values in range 0-255, separated by commas.

ImagePadKJ.name: ImagePadKJ
ImagePadKJ.description: Pad the input image and optionally mask with the specified padding.
